data.title: Update CLAUDE.md and KNOWN-ISSUES.md for onboarding epic changes (26d0-eccf)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Context
Final story in epic 1a6f-086b. Updates CLAUDE.md and KNOWN-ISSUES.md to reflect the onboarding skill restructuring from S1-S5:
- Phase 0 comfort assessment added
- Phase 0.5 doc-folder scan added (--doc-folder param, scan-docs.sh)
- 6 batch groups formalized (including hook-install as group 5)
- pre-commit added as required dep
- Phase 2 confidence-based routing added (high=skip, medium=confirm, low=ask)
- CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT schema contract added

## What to Check
1. CLAUDE.md quick reference: Does the /dso:onboarding entry accurately describe current behavior?
2. KNOWN-ISSUES.md: Any entries mentioning hook install deadlock, missing pre-commit dep, or onboarding sequencing that are now resolved by this epic?
3. docs/adr/: Any new architectural decisions from this epic that warrant an ADR entry?

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md onboarding section accurately reflects epic changes (--doc-folder param, pre-commit dep, batch groups)
  Verify: grep -q 'onboarding' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] KNOWN-ISSUES.md entries resolved by this epic are marked resolved or removed
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL | head -5
- [ ] No documentation files were created (updates only per story scope)
  Verify: git diff --name-only HEAD~1 | grep -v '\.md$' | head -5
